clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
Hey <@1460350041016238303> , what’s going on man. Hope you're doing well.

I looked over the results you sent and I’ll be honest, it caught me a bit off guard.

From what we’re seeing on our end, the current ads are actually performing quite well from a lead generation standpoint. The cost per lead on the most recent campaign has been sitting around $78 over the last couple of weeks, which is about half of what you mentioned you were paying before (~$160) with the more generic ad that was just a stock bathtub photo and nothing really specific about the business.

The other big difference is the style of the ads we’re running now. Instead of just a generic bathtub or shower image, these ads are much more personalized to your company — showing your team and speaking directly about the business. The goal with that approach is to make the ads feel more trustworthy and attract homeowners who are actually interested in working with your company.

I attached the ad we’re currently running so you can check it out.

Because the leads are coming in at a much lower cost and the ads are more personalized, I’m honestly trying to understand where the disconnect might be happening after the leads come in.

Since we don’t have access to the CRM on this one, I’m curious about a couple things on your side:

• Are the leads from the last 7–14 days responding when you follow up with them?
• Have any of them turned into appointments or jobs yet?
• What does the follow-up process look like once a lead comes in?

I really want to get to the bottom of this because I still feel like there’s a lot of potential here. If the ads are generating leads at a good cost and they’re seeing your business upfront, there should definitely be opportunity there.

Curious what you’re seeing on your side.

clientMessages.author: mikeweb_73081
clientMessages.content: Thanks Max. Im aware of the ads we/you are running...They have been in my feeds. I don't understand what is wrong with them either but we just havent been able to convert them at all....to issues leads or sales. If you would like to talk about our follow up actions we can but we exhaust all options through either text or calls....the same way we use all of the rest of our lead sources. I would be happy to jump on a call sometime and screen share our process.
